community.explainer: Add friends, share your favorite concerts, and get tickets together online.

finished-order.mail-sent-to: We can’t wait to welcome you to the BSO. Your tickets are available in the app and a confirmation has been emailed to:
finished-order.more-info: Please check your confirmation email or tickets page for more purchase information.

slide1.text1: Discover concerts, access exclusive content, and make the most of every performance - all in one place. Whether you're a longtime patron or joining us for the first time, your BSO journey starts here.
slide1.title: Welcome to the Baltimore Symphony App!

slide2.text1: Invite friends to concerts, share your favorite performances, and be part of our vibrant music community. Every concert is better together.
slide2.title: Connect with Friends

slide3.text1: Reserve tickets for upcoming concerts and access them anytime, right from the app. Add tickets to your digital wallet for fast, easy entry on concert night.
slide3.title: Manage Your Tickets

slide4.text1: Plan your visit, access custom content and offers, and enjoy exclusive app-only features designed to enhance your time with the BSO.
slide4.title: Orchestrate Your Experience

footer.label: Curious about what else the BSO has to offer?
